name: Cinder Creatures
description: Cinder monster-catcher pack for GB Studio 4.x v0.11: USB-driven catch loop now runs end-to-end. Companion app reads chats/journal/vault/streak from cinder.db and writes a 16-slot encounter pool the ROM picks from via the new EVENT_CC_POOL_ENCOUNTER event. Includes 56 cinderized creature sprites, 15 script events, playable starter scenes (Player Room -> name entry -> CORE LAB -> 3-way pick), 14 backgrounds, overworld tileset, 5 sound FX, 5-type chart, 5 named gym leaders (ARCHIVIST EOS/WARDEN SOMA/CONDUCTOR TEMPO/COURIER HERMES/FOREMAN ATLAS).
author: Meridian (for Joel Kometz)
